## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] No direct commits to `main`
- [ ] Code follows project patterns and namespaced URLs
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local-only files included
